---
title: "Francis Hansard Rivington"
---

## Francis Hansard Rivington

**Dates:** (1834-1913)

### Description

publisher

### Biography

In her ODNB article on the Rivington family, Barbara Laning Fitzpatrick observes that Francis Hansard Rivington dealt with the theological side of the busness, so it is presumably he to whom CMY refers.

### Letters

- Letter from 16 July [1867]
- Letter from Whit Monday [10 June]1867

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
